case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. DEAN SILVERMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
